scripts.build: npm run build -w @materfold/core && npm run build -w @materfold/data && npm run build -w @materfold/api && npm run build -w @materfold/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @materfold/core && npm run build -w @materfold/data && npm run typecheck -w @materfold/api && npm run typecheck -w @materfold/frontend && npm run typecheck -w @materfold/data
scripts.test: npm run test -w @materfold/core && npm run test -w @materfold/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @materfold/core && npm run lint -w @materfold/api && npm run lint -w @materfold/frontend && npm run lint -w @materfold/data
